Notes: King won first meeting of season 62-48 at SIU on Jan. 15
Fewest points allowed by King since Knoxville College scored 10 on 11/20/06
Fewest points scored by Salem International this season
Game.Officials: Butch Patterson,  Mark Hale & Steve Caldwell
